## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it is needed. Link related issues with "Closes #N". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Frontend impact is reviewed or acknowledged (`views/*`, `public/*`, and page flows)
- [ ] Backend/API impact is reviewed or acknowledged (`src/routes/*`, `src/db/*`, `src/middleware/*`, `src/providers/*`, migrations, and tests)
- [ ] No real credentials, RPC URLs, or private indexer details are introduced
- [ ] Environment variables added or changed are documented in `README.md` and `.env.example`
- [ ] If a public API route changed, `docs/api.md` is updated
